title: cistus pruinosus
intro: Cistus pruinosus is a flowering plant species in the Cistus genus, commonly known as the hairy rockrose, characterized by its hairy leaves and pink to white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cistus pruinosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Cistus pruinosus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support skin and respiratory health.
